title: Northern Ireland planning statistics October to December 2024
body: "This report presents a summary of Northern Ireland planning volumes and processing performances for the district councils and the Department for Infrastructure (DfI) during the third quarter of 2024/25. Quarterly data will be provided in accompanying excel tables together with comparable data from the previous financial year where possible. Please note that these figures are provisional and finalised annual figures will become available after the end of the financial year. "
